text.title: Retention Metrics Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when in doubt about which variant to apply.

decision-tree.root-question: Do all Applies-If preconditions hold and no Skip-If trigger fires?

conclusion.verdict: do not run this methodology; document skip rationale
add D1 + D7 + D30 to default dashboard
set MAU floor + segment by plan / cohort
backtest score on >= 6 months historical churners
switch default reporting to monthly + quarterly deep-dive

text.example: preconditions=true → readiness gates evaluated → all_checks_pass==true → conclusion ref=monthly-not-quarterly-default
